content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Advice Files - Section 87206

Date: March 4, 1985
File No.: M-85-052

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Diane Maura Fishburn

Subject: Reportability of Personal Residences

Section 87206, effective January 1, 1985, was amended to provide that a filer need not disclose an interest in a personal residence if it is exclusively used by the filer for personal purposes. I advised Bob Leidigh that this exception would apply to a vacation cabin which he co-owns with his wife, brother and sister-in-law and is used exclusively for their personal enjoyment.

DMF:plh
